backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TRI-GITA SERVICES backend, handling lead submission, deletion, retrieval, and user profile management with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old Lead schema (phoneNumber, address, installationType) into the new schema (phone, city, systemSize) during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping frontend feature IDs and titles to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs for the TRI-GITA SERVICES solar website.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, theme, and any notable fixes applied during development.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the React root at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, etc.) in order, wrapped in a LanguageProvider context with a FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank financing stats with a shimmer animation, gold stat cards, and a WhatsApp CTA button using i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a pulse ring animation, hover tooltip using the t.floating.tooltip translation key, and a link to the WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy background, gold accents, brand info, and a contact column with phone, email, address, and service area details using i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, plus a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards (speed, cost, shield).
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with fields for name, phone, email, city, and system size; validates input, submits via a React Query mutation, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns, animated into view via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section about the government solar scheme, listing benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step installation process with icons and connecting lines.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-card services section (residential and commercial solar) showing feature lists with images and accent-colored CTA buttons that scroll to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, using a hardcoded WhatsApp number and i18n text.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, icons, and i18n-translated titles and descriptions.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the leads query on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines multilingual translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, services, and warranty content.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage and the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes, Outfit/Playfair Display fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing feature implementations, architectural notes, and image requirements for the TRI-GITA SERVICES solar energy frontend.
